title: Monetary T
description: Exploring relationship struggles and imminent endings.
lyrics: I'll hit it like this, I'll hit it, I'll hit it, I'll hit it, I'll hit it, I'll hit it Night breaks me in, night breaks me in, take it all Take it all when you're here and knowing that the end is near I'll take you there, I'll take you all the way, all the way Baby, I know the end is near, I'll take you all the way I'll take you all the way, all the way, baby When the night gets hard enough to feel, I know you wanna think it's real Too much time sitting in the dark and I can't get you to feel at all I know I'll take you there, I know your mind is better I know imagination takes you places you won't like, yeah Ooh, I'll take you there, that's right, in the night Every time you wanna fuck with me, it's over Every time you wanna climb the tree, I'll take you there, I'll hate you there I don't have you hate me at the end, it seems the only way we ever go on I let go, but there's one problem that I'll take you there One problem that I'll take you there, connected like a tether, ooh I said I'll take you there, take you there, ooh You know the wasted way I stare, darkness, dark, darkness, dark Darkness, dark, darkness, got us all I'll take you there, ooh, I'll take you there In the road, we fight, we be ours to behold

lyricsSegments.text: I'll hit it like this, I'll hit it, I'll hit it, I'll hit it, I'll hit it, I'll hit it
Night breaks me in, night breaks me in, take it all
Take it all when you're here and knowing that the end is near
I'll take you there, I'll take you all the way, all the way
Baby, I know the end is near, I'll take you all the way
I'll take you all the way, all the way, baby
When the night gets hard enough to feel, I know you wanna think it's real
Too much time sitting in the dark and I can't get you to feel at all
I know I'll take you there, I know your mind is better
I know imagination takes you places you won't like, yeah
Ooh, I'll take you there, that's right, in the night
Every time you wanna fuck with me, it's over
Every time you wanna climb the tree, I'll take you there, I'll hate you there
I don't have you hate me at the end, it seems the only way we ever go on
I let go, but there's one problem that I'll take you there
One problem that I'll take you there, connected like a tether, ooh
I said I'll take you there, take you there, ooh
You know the wasted way I stare, darkness, dark, darkness, dark
Darkness, dark, darkness, got us all
I'll take you there, ooh, I'll take you there
In the road, we fight, we be ours to behold
